name: Life Tenis
tagline: Tennis platform for Life Montevideo: tournaments and a permanent ranking ladder
description: A web platform for the tennis community at Life Montevideo. Its centerpiece is La Escalera, a permanent, always-live club ranking: every player holds a single ranked position and climbs by challenging others — win or lose, points shift and standings update, with monthly activity commitments, a player of the week, and notifications. Alongside it, admins run tournaments with multiple categories, import players via CSV, schedule matches, and publish rankings and fixtures, while players sign in with email OTP and keep public profiles with their match history.
highlights: La Escalera: a permanent, always-live club ranking — one list, climb by challenging others
Challenge flow with win/loss point stakes and live position movement
Monthly activity commitment, player of the week, and evolution tracking
Tournament management with categories, CSV player import, and round-robin generation
Passwordless OTP email authentication and public player profiles with match history
Dynamic rankings and fixtures shareable via WhatsApp
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, .claude/ directory, and agent skills configured)
